description: Producer submits a publish request with visibility=restricted but no audience field. Registry MUST reject with schema_violation (HTTP 400) per RFC-ACDP-0002 §7 and RFC-ACDP-0003 §2.1 step 12. The acdp-publish-request.schema.json's allOf clause enforces 'if visibility=restricted, audience is required'.

input.notes: audience field omitted. visibility=restricted requires audience to be present and non-empty.
